revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:姉埼神社); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:32, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96375321 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:32, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:姉埼神社 | revid=96375321 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=姉埼神社|date1=2007年8月27日 }} ---- [http://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E5%A7%89%E5%9F%BC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE&oldid=11125116 初版（2007-03-08T16:23:15(UTC)）]の「由緒」が[http://www.ne.jp/asahi/anesaki/ichihara/tenji/jinjya/jinjya.htm]の「由緒」と全く同じ文章なのですが、大丈夫でしょうか。[http://www.archive.org/ InternetArchive]によれば、当該外部サイトは2002年2月13日にすでに現在の文章になっていたようですので、Wikipediaの方が後です。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2007年8月24日 (金) 08:31 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:姉埼神社); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:47, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:32, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96375321 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:姉埼神社 | revid=96375321 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=姉埼神社|date1=2007年8月27日 }} ---- [http://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E5%A7%89%E5%9F%BC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE&oldid=11125116 初版（2007-03-08T16:23:15(UTC)）]の「由緒」が[http://www.ne.jp/asahi/anesaki/ichihara/tenji/jinjya/jinjya.htm]の「由緒」と全く同じ文章なのですが、大丈夫でしょうか。[http://www.archive.org/ InternetArchive]によれば、当該外部サイトは2002年2月13日にすでに現在の文章になっていたようですので、Wikipediaの方が後です。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2007年8月24日 (金) 08:31 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Anesaki_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Anesaki_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:47, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:32, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96375321 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:49, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:姉埼神社 | revid=96375321 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=姉埼神社|date1=2007年8月27日 }} ---- [http://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E5%A7%89%E5%9F%BC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE&oldid=11125116 初版（2007-03-08T16:23:15(UTC)）]の「由緒」が[http://www.ne.jp/asahi/anesaki/ichihara/tenji/jinjya/jinjya.htm]の「由緒」と全く同じ文章なのですが、大丈夫でしょうか。[http://www.archive.org/ InternetArchive]によれば、当該外部サイトは2002年2月13日にすでに現在の文章になっていたようですので、Wikipediaの方が後です。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2007年8月24日 (金) 08:31 (UTC)
